data_description.callsign: Your amateur radio callsign, optionally with SSID (e.g. KE5YIM or KE5YIM-1).
data_description.passcode: Your APRS-IS passcode. Use -1 for receive-only mode (outbound actions will be disabled).

data_description.callsign: Your amateur radio callsign, optionally with SSID (e.g. KE5YIM or KE5YIM-1).
data_description.passcode: Your APRS-IS passcode. Use -1 for receive-only mode (outbound actions will be disabled).

error.cannot_connect: Unable to connect to the APRS-IS server. Check hostname and port.
error.invalid_callsign: Invalid callsign format (e.g. KE5YIM or KE5YIM-1).
error.invalid_passcode: Passcode must be a number between -1 and 99999.

data_description.range_filter_radius: Receive all APRS packets within this radius of your Home Assistant location. Set to 0 to disable. Combines with callsign-specific filters.
data_description.filter_extra: Additional APRS-IS filter terms appended verbatim after the auto-generated filter. See aprs-is.net/javAPRSFilter.aspx for syntax.
data_description.event_rate_limit: Maximum Home Assistant events fired per second. Set to 0 for unlimited. Entity state updates are never rate-limited.
data_description.beacon_interval: Periodically transmit a position report for the login callsign using the Home Assistant home location and a house symbol. Set to 0 to disable.

add_station.title: Add Station
add_station.description: Add any APRS callsign to track. Stations sharing the base callsign {base_callsign} are considered your stations.

data_description.callsign: Any amateur radio callsign with optional SSID (e.g. W1ABC-9).
data_description.position_type: How to show this station's position in Home Assistant.
How to show this station's position in Home Assistant.

data_description.callsign: Callsign of the APRS weather station (e.g. KE5YIM-13). Weather sensors and a weather entity will be created. Can be any callsign — not limited to your own.
Select the weather station to remove.

data_description.wx_beacon_interval: Automatically transmit a weather report at this interval. Set to 0 to disable.
data_description.wx_beacon_from_call: Callsign to send the beacon as (e.g. KE5YIM-13). Leave blank to use the login callsign.
data_description.wx_beacon_comment: Free-text comment appended to the weather packet. Defaults to "Home Assistant".
data_description.wx_beacon_latitude: Override the WX station latitude. Leave blank to use the Home Assistant home location.
data_description.wx_beacon_longitude: Override the WX station longitude. Leave blank to use the Home Assistant home location.
data_description.wx_ent_temp: Any temperature sensor (°C, °F, K). Converted to °F for the packet.
data_description.wx_ent_pressure: Any pressure sensor (hPa, mb, inHg, PSI, kPa). Converted to mb.
data_description.wx_ent_wind_speed: Any speed sensor (mph, km/h, m/s, kn). Converted to mph.
data_description.wx_ent_wind_gust: Any speed sensor (mph, km/h, m/s, kn). Converted to mph.
data_description.wx_ent_rain_1h: Precipitation sensor for last hour (mm or in).
data_description.wx_ent_rain_24h: Precipitation sensor for last 24 hours (mm or in).
data_description.wx_ent_rain_midnight: Precipitation sensor since midnight (mm or in).
data_description.wx_staleness_entity: Optional. If this entity has not updated within the max age, the beacon is skipped. Leave blank to always send.
data_description.wx_staleness_max_age: How old the staleness entity's last update can be before the beacon is suppressed.

error.invalid_callsign: Invalid callsign format. Use your callsign with optional SSID (e.g. KE5YIM or KE5YIM-9).

options.none: None — packet count and last-seen only. Good for stations you just want to know are active.
options.device_tracker: Device Tracker — integrates with HA zones and presence detection. Use this for your callsigns or people you want to trigger automations based on home/away status.
options.geo_location: Map Pin (Geo Location) — shows a position pin on the HA map with no zone integration. Good for other APRS stations you want to see visually without affecting automations.

send_message.name: Send APRS Message
send_message.description: Send a direct APRS message to a specific callsign.

from_call.name: From callsign
from_call.description: Override the sending callsign. Defaults to the configured login callsign.

send_bulletin.name: Send APRS Bulletin
send_bulletin.description: Send a numbered or named APRS bulletin.

bulletin_id.name: Bulletin ID
bulletin_id.description: BLN0–BLN9 number or a name up to 5 characters (e.g. 0, 1, WEATHER).

send_wx_report.name: Send APRS Weather Report
send_wx_report.description: Send an APRS weather report using values from Home Assistant sensors.

rain_1h_hundredths.name: Rain last 1h (0.01 in)
rain_1h_hundredths.description: Rainfall in last hour in hundredths of an inch.

rain_24h_hundredths.name: Rain last 24h (0.01 in)
rain_24h_hundredths.description: Rainfall in last 24 hours in hundredths of an inch.

rain_midnight_hundredths.name: Rain since midnight (0.01 in)
rain_midnight_hundredths.description: Rainfall since midnight in hundredths of an inch.

luminosity.name: Luminosity (W/m²)
luminosity.description: Solar radiation in watts per square meter.

latitude.name: Latitude
latitude.description: Override the WX station latitude. Defaults to your HA home location.

longitude.name: Longitude
longitude.description: Override the WX station longitude. Defaults to your HA home location.

from_call.name: From callsign
from_call.description: Override the sending callsign (e.g. KE5YIM-13 for a WX callsign).

send_object.name: Send APRS Object
send_object.description: Create or update an APRS object on the map.

latitude.name: Latitude
latitude.description: Decimal degrees. Defaults to the Home Assistant home location.

longitude.name: Longitude
longitude.description: Decimal degrees. Defaults to the Home Assistant home location.

comment.name: Comment
comment.description: Optional comment appended to the object packet.

delete_object.name: Delete APRS Object
delete_object.description: Kill an APRS object (sends a killed object packet).

object_name.name: Object name
object_name.description: Name of the object to kill.

send_wx_report_from_entities.name: Send APRS Weather Report (from entities)
send_wx_report_from_entities.description: Send an APRS weather report by pointing to existing Home Assistant sensor entities. Units are detected automatically and converted.

temperature_entity.name: Temperature sensor
temperature_entity.description: Any temperature sensor (°C, °F, K). Converted to °F for the packet.

pressure_entity.name: Pressure sensor
pressure_entity.description: Any pressure sensor (hPa, mb, inHg, PSI, kPa). Converted to mb.

wind_speed_entity.name: Wind speed sensor
wind_speed_entity.description: Any speed sensor (mph, km/h, m/s, kn). Converted to mph.

wind_gust_entity.name: Wind gust sensor
wind_gust_entity.description: Any speed sensor (mph, km/h, m/s, kn). Converted to mph.

rain_1h_entity.name: Rain last 1h sensor
rain_1h_entity.description: Precipitation sensor for last hour (mm or in).

rain_24h_entity.name: Rain last 24h sensor
rain_24h_entity.description: Precipitation sensor for last 24 hours (mm or in).

rain_midnight_entity.name: Rain since midnight sensor
rain_midnight_entity.description: Precipitation sensor since midnight (mm or in).

latitude.name: Latitude
latitude.description: Override the WX station latitude. Defaults to your HA home location.

longitude.name: Longitude
longitude.description: Override the WX station longitude. Defaults to your HA home location.

from_call.name: From callsign
from_call.description: Override the sending callsign (e.g. KE5YIM-13 for a WX callsign).

send_position.name: Send APRS Position Report
send_position.description: Send an APRS position report for a callsign.

latitude.name: Latitude
latitude.description: Decimal degrees. Defaults to the Home Assistant home location.

longitude.name: Longitude
longitude.description: Decimal degrees. Defaults to the Home Assistant home location.

symbol_code.name: Symbol code
symbol_code.description: APRS symbol code character (e.g. > for car, - for house, / for dot).

comment.name: Comment
comment.description: Optional free-text comment appended to the position packet.

speed_mph.name: Speed (mph)
speed_mph.description: Speed in miles per hour. Encoded as knots in the packet.

altitude_ft.name: Altitude (ft)
altitude_ft.description: Altitude in feet above mean sea level.

from_call.name: From callsign
from_call.description: Override the sending callsign (e.g. KE5YIM-9 for a mobile station).
